headings.style: Elegant, tight tracking for high-end luxury editorial feel

body.style: Clean, minimal, stark contrast to the serif headings

layouts.hero: Massive kinetic typography 'A.S. SOLUTIONS' split or staggered. Use Framer Motion for line-by-line masked reveals. Background should be #0A0A0A with a very subtle, slow-moving luxury interior image layered behind at 20% opacity. Include the 'AS' monogram prominently.
layouts.marquee: A single, slow-moving editorial marquee using `react-fast-marquee`. Text: 'MODERN KITCHEN • FURNITURE • CIVIL WORKS • ELECTRICAL • INTERIOR DESIGN'. Style: `font-serif text-5xl md:text-7xl text-white/50 hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors`.
layouts.services_manifesto: Numbered chapters (01, 02, 03...). Large gold numbers (`text-7xl md:text-9xl text-[#D4AF37]/20`). Asymmetrical grid layout for services. Images clipped in tall vertical frames, appearing or slightly expanding on hover (parallax effect).
layouts.contact_section: Massive 'LET'S TALK' heading. A glassmorphism/premium card containing Ankur Singh's details. A prominent scannable WhatsApp QR code (use react-qr-code or similar, or just a stylized square if mocked). Direct CTA buttons for Email and WhatsApp with gold hover states.

motion.smooth_scroll: Lenis is MANDATORY. Initialize standard Lenis smooth scrolling.
motion.hero_reveal: Framer Motion. `initial={{ y: '100%' }}` `animate={{ y: 0 }}` with `overflow: hidden` on parent for that masked text reveal effect.
motion.hover_effects: Images scale up slightly (`scale-105`) within `overflow-hidden` containers. Buttons have an inner gold glow or border trace effect.
motion.parallax: Use Framer Motion's `useScroll` and `useTransform` to make the hero background or service images move slightly at a different speed than the scroll.

hero_background.description: Dark premium living room for hero background (use at low opacity)

components.name: Hero Section
components.instructions: Full height. Uses Framer Motion for text reveal. Background image wrapped in a motion div for subtle slow pan.

components.name: Marquee
components.instructions: Use react-fast-marquee. Very slow speed, seamless loop.

components.name: Services Grid
components.instructions: Asymmetrical layout. DO NOT USE STANDARD CARDS. Use text blocks paired with floating images. Treat them like an editorial spread.

components.name: Contact & Footer
components.instructions: Include all provided contact details. Display a QR code (use `react-qr-code` to generate the WhatsApp QR for phone number 7738600502). Direct `mailto:` and `wa.me/` links for buttons.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure the gold text on the dark background passes APCA/WCAG. Use off-white #FAFAFA for standard text.
accessibility.data_testids: Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: This is a FULLY STATIC SITE. No backend endpoints. No form submissions to servers—just mailto: and wa.me/ links.
MUST use Lenis for smooth scroll.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter. Use the provided Cormorant Garamond and Manrope.
Do not center everything—use asymmetrical tension.
DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for overlays.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
Ensure the application works seamlessly as a static site export.
